name: Spock Framework
description: BDD-style testing framework for Java and Groovy applications, featuring expressive Groovy DSL, data-driven tests and built-in mocking via interaction-based Mock().

seo.title: Spock Framework — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Spock Framework: BDD-style testing framework for Java and Groovy applications, featuring expressive Groovy DSL, data-driven tests and built-in mocking via inter

when_to_use: Data-driven tests with where: tables in Groovy DSL
Built-in mock and stub via Mock() and Stub() blocks
BDD-style given/when/then blocks for Java services
Expressive Groovy DSL reducing Java test boilerplate

pros: Expressive Groovy DSL for JVM tests
cons: Requires Groovy in your build chain
Kotlin test ecosystem is stealing mindshare
Slower feedback loop than pure JUnit 5
review.verdict: Still the most expressive JVM test framework, though Kotest and JUnit 5 cover most new projects today.
review.best_for: JVM teams comfortable with Groovy who value data-driven and interaction-based testing
review.not_for: Pure Java or Kotlin projects avoiding the Groovy dependency
